title: Communauté de communes de la Vallée d'Auge
summary: The Communauté de communes de la Vallée d'Auge is a former communauté de communes in the Calvados département and in the Normandy région of France. It was created in January 2002. It was merged into the new Communauté d'agglomération Lisieux Normandie in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes de la Vallée d'Auge is a former communauté de communes in the Calvados département and in the Normandy région of France. It was created in January 2002. It was merged into the new Communauté d'agglomération Lisieux Normandie in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 20 communes:
